day3_lunch_start.name: Me
day3_lunch_start.text: *Lunchtime. I opened my desk drawer, and there's a note inside.*

day3_lunch_note.name: Me
day3_lunch_note.text: *'Senpai, please come to the rooftop during lunch. Make sure you come alone. It's important. - Yuna'*

day3_lunch_rooftop_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_2.text: *Yuna pulls out a memory card with trembling hands.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_3.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_3.text: "I couldn't keep holding onto this alone anymore..."

day3_lunch_rooftop_4.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_4.text: "Senpai, I've been at this school for 3 years. I'm in the photography club. I photograph everything that happens at school."

day3_lunch_rooftop_5.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_5.text: "Every time a transfer student came, I photographed them. For the record."

day3_lunch_rooftop_7.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_7.text: "This is transfer student number 1, who came 3 years ago."

day3_lunch_rooftop_8.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_8.text: *A photo. A student standing in front of the school gate. Short black hair. Stiff school uniform. Name tag: 'Kim Dojin'.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_9.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_9.text: "This is number 3, who came after that."

day3_lunch_rooftop_10.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_10.text: *A photo. Same school gate. Different student. Brown hair. Name tag: 'Park Seojin'.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_12.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_12.text: *A photo. A boy with long hair. Haggard face. Name tag: 'Kim Taeho'.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_14.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_14.text: *A photo. In front of the school gate. Yesterday morning. It's my photo.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_16.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_16.text: *Yuna arranges the photos side by side on one screen. Number 1 through 13. Different hair colors. Different name tags. Different uniform styles. **But they're all boys. The same boy.***

day3_lunch_rooftop_17.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_17.text: ***13 photos. 13 names. All the same face.***

day3_lunch_rooftop_19.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_19.text: "Senpai... **why do all 13 of them have the exact same face?**"

day3_lunch_rooftop_20.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_20.text: "Senpai... why do they all act like they don't know their own names, like they're complete strangers who just arrived...?"

day3_lunch_rooftop_22.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_22.text: *Yuna's voice seems to fade into the distance. My heartbeat pounds in my ears.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_23.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_23.text: "...Isn't this photoshopped? Like, with editing software..."

day3_lunch_rooftop_24.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_24.text: "It's been 3 years, senpai. For 3 years, the same face with a different name tag has been coming to this school every time. I thought I was going insane."

day3_lunch_rooftop_25.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_25.text: "I couldn't tell anyone. Who would believe me? Even I didn't believe it at first."

day3_lunch_rooftop_26.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_26.text: *Yuna's eyes are red. She's biting her lip. The camera in her hands is shaking.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_27.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_27.text: "When number 1 came... I was in my first year of middle school. I just thought, oh, a new transfer student."

day3_lunch_rooftop_28.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_28.text: "When number 3 came, I felt something was off. They looked alike, I thought. But when I mentioned it to people around me, everyone said 'What are you talking about?' Even the teachers."

day3_lunch_rooftop_29.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_29.text: "From the 5th one, I was scared. I couldn't tell if I was the one who was wrong, or if the world was wrong."

day3_lunch_rooftop_30.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_30.text: *Yuna sets the camera down and covers her face with both hands. A moment. Her shoulders are trembling.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_31.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_31.text: "...I'm sorry. For suddenly showing you all this."

day3_lunch_rooftop_33.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_33.text: *It's not fine. Nothing is fine. But right now, the one crying is Yuna.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_34.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_34.text: "Knowing this alone was driving me crazy. Every time I take a photo, my hands shake. What if it's the same face again. How many days until this one disappears too."

day3_lunch_rooftop_37.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_37.text: "Yes. All of them. A week at most. Three days at least. One day they're suddenly gone. Nobody remembers. 'Was there ever a student like that?' they say."

day3_lunch_rooftop_38.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_38.text: *Yuna looks at me. Her eyes are red, her nose tip is red. But her gaze is steady.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_41.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_41.text: *My chest is tight. I can't breathe.*

day3_lunch_rooftop_42.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_42.text: *This isn't my first time at this school? I'm... the 13th?*

day3_lunch_rooftop_43.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_43.text: *Then what about my "previous school"? What about "Minsu"? The memory of "transferring because of my parents' work"?*

day3_lunch_door_1.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_1.text: *...! Suddenly the rooftop door slammed shut with a BANG.*

day3_lunch_door_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_2.text: *I push the door. It won't open. It's been locked from the outside.*

day3_lunch_door_choice.name: Me
choices: Bang on the door and shout

day3_lunch_door_bang.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_bang.text: *I pounded on the door hard. 5 minutes later, the door opens. Nobody there. No lock either. ...No trace of who locked it.*

day3_lunch_door_wait.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_wait.text: *I held Yuna's shoulders and calmed her down. 5 minutes later, the door opens. Nobody there. No lock either. ...No trace of who locked it.*

day3_lunch_door_open.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open.text: *We go down the stairs. Yuna follows behind me. Neither of us says a word.*

day3_lunch_door_open_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_2.text: *...The photos Yuna showed me earlier won't leave my head. 13 photos of the same face. My face.*

day3_lunch_door_open_3.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_3.text: *It doesn't make sense. It logically doesn't make sense.*

day3_lunch_door_open_4.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_4.text: *"That's impossible... I was at my old school... with Minsu..."*

day3_lunch_door_open_5.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_5.text: *These are my own memories coming out of my own mouth, yet my lips feel like they're reading someone else's script.*

day3_lunch_door_open_6.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_6.text: *My stomach turns. I brace myself against the wall. I can't tell if what's rising is nausea or terror.*

day3_lunch_door_open_7.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_7.text: *But I can't deny it either. Because the photos exist.*

day3_lunch_door_open_8.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_8.text: *Walking down the hallway, I look at the students passing by. Which of them knows? Which of them doesn't? Which of them is thinking 'Oh, he's back again'?*

day3_lunch_door_open_9.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_door_open_9.text: "Senpai, the photos... don't show them to anyone. Especially not the teachers."

day3_lunch_door_open_11.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_11.text: *Yuna parts ways at the first floor. Before turning away, she looks at me once. Those eyes are saying 'I'm sorry' and 'please' at the same time.*

day3_lunch_door_open_12.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open_12.text: *I'm left alone. The hallway is long.*

day3_lunch_sea_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_2.text: *Sea is smiling. ...But this smile is different from yesterday's. If yesterday's smile was 'happy,' today's smile is closer to 'confirming.'*

day3_lunch_sea_3.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_3.text: *I sat down across from Sea. Sea looks at my lunch tray.*

day3_lunch_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_4.text: "Today's menu looks good. {name}, you like mackerel, right."

day3_lunch_sea_5.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_5.text: *...I never said I like mackerel. I do like it, though.*

day3_lunch_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_7.text: "I saw you yesterday when you were picking side dishes. You went for the fish first."

day3_lunch_sea_8.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_8.text: *...Did I? I don't remember. Sea reads my expression. Precisely.*

day3_lunch_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_9.text: "...{name}, you seem to be wandering around alone a lot lately?"

day3_lunch_sea_12.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_12.text: *Sea picks up a side dish with her chopsticks and stops. Her gaze is fixed on her tray. A long silence.*

day3_lunch_sea_13.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_13.text: *It's noisy all around, but this table is quiet. The air is heavy.*

day3_lunch_sea_14.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_14.text: "...You're hiding something from me, aren't you."

day3_lunch_sea_15.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_15.text: *Her eyes aren't smiling. Her voice is low. Is this the usual Sea? Or is this the real Sea? For a moment our eyes meet. What's in there isn't hurt or anger. It's **fear**. She's afraid of me slipping away.*

day3_lunch_sea_17.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_17.text: *Sea smiles. This time it's a perfect smile. So perfect it gives me chills.*

day3_lunch_riin_1.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_1.text: *I opened the nurse's office door. The smell of disinfectant stings my nose. Nurse Riin is standing in front of the cabinet. She turns when the door opens.*

day3_lunch_riin_4.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_4.text: *Nurse Riin points to the bed. I sat down. She places her hand on my forehead. A cool hand.*

day3_lunch_riin_5.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_5.text: "No fever... but your complexion is bad."

day3_lunch_riin_6.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_6.text: *Nurse Riin turns around and takes something from the cabinet. I can see her back. Her shoulders pause for a moment. A brief hesitation, as if she's making a decision.*

day3_lunch_riin_7.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_7.text: "Today, specially... how about a health drink I made?"

day3_lunch_riin_8.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_8.text: *When she turns back, there's a clear cup with pale purple liquid in her hands. A faint, chemical-like smell. And — the hand offering the cup is trembling. A subtle tremor. You wouldn't notice unless you looked. But it's definitely trembling.*

day3_lunch_riin_9.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_9.text: "It's a vitamin and herb blend. Good for you."

day3_lunch_riin_choice.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_choice.text: *Nurse Riin is smiling. A gentle smile. But her eyes... are holding something back.*

day3_lunch_riin_drink_1.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_drink_1.text: *I took a sip. ...A bitter taste lingers under my tongue. My mouth feels slightly dry.*

day3_lunch_riin_drink_2.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_drink_2.text: "...You don't have to finish it. The taste is a bit much, right?"

day3_lunch_riin_drink_3.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_drink_3.text: *Nurse Riin takes the cup away. The moment she turns — she's biting her lip hard.*

day3_lunch_riin_refuse_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_refuse_2.text: *Nurse Riin takes the cup away. She pours the contents down the sink. I see her back. The tension leaves her shoulders. ...Relief?*

day3_lunch_alone_1.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_1.text: *I stayed in the classroom and ate alone. Through the window, I can see the schoolyard. Kids are playing soccer.*

day3_lunch_alone_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_2.text: *...It's quiet. Too quiet. I'm the only one in the classroom.*

day3_lunch_alone_3.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_3.text: *I look at the back seat. Seolhwa's seat. Empty again today. She hasn't attended for 3 days straight. But nobody seems to think it's strange. Even the homeroom teacher skips her name during roll call.*

day3_lunch_alone_4.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_4.text: *There's something on Seolhwa's desk. Writing in pencil. Very faint. **'Get out of here'***

day3_lunch_alone_6.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_6.text: *I run my hand over the desk surface. It's been carved deeply. It wasn't written once. Multiple times. Traces of the same words written over and over.*

day3_lunch_alone_7.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_7.text: *...The handwriting is the same as under the desk and the locker. My handwriting.*

day3_lunch_alone_8.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_8.text: *I've lost my appetite. I closed my lunch box.*

day3_lunch_end.name: Me
day3_lunch_end.text: *I came back to the classroom. My heart won't stop racing.*
